title: DurabilityDisplay
description: This is a simple mod that will replace the regular durability or energy bar on items with a percentage value. This mod is a port of the original version, made for the GTNH Modpack
body:
DuraDisplay
This is a simple mod that will replace the regular durability or energy bar on items with a percentage value. This mod is a port of the original version, made for the GTNH Modpack


The mod currently only support durability and energy bars, you can however add support for your own bars using the api Click here for more info on the api

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6294e74734fa421bad63441af7e55c7e781696cb.png)
![0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/205d8d37bfc94794f3e56982a5d9fffd831e8391.png)

Credits to the GTNH Team and specifically Caedis for creating the original version of this mod. Their 1.7.10 Version can be found [here](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/DuraDisplay)!

For any issues or suggestions, please head over to the [Github](https://github.com/Leclowndu93150/DuraDisplay/issues)
